title: Emberfired
description: A api for InitsuIgnis's Supporter Perks and apis i use across my mods.
body:
## Notice Emberfired has been deprecated and replaced with as of 2026 AmyLib by AmyQöliton
# Emberfired **Emberfired** is an api for InitsuIgnis mods and supporter perks alongside a collection of resources used in collectively all their mods. ## What it adds? It adds an api for supporter management, prefixes, etc. ## What else is there? Nothing Really it's just an api for my mods. Documentation Work in progress on main website page: [Endersource](https://flakily-nondissipative-soren.ngrok-free.dev/endersource) ### Notice This mod's web api has been shut down due to low funding and is no longer going to support supporters for now please wait till june for more info.
